title: Melted Kenyan Foie Gras Grill
description: A quick-fix Kenyan dish featuring foie gras, served en-croute and low-carb friendly, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the foie gras slices with rock salt and black pepper.
Place the foie gras slices on the raclette grill and sear for 2 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, mix the lemon juice and garlic butter in a small bowl.
Brush the garlic butter mixture on the foie gras slices during the last minute of cooking.
Top each foie gras slice with a slice of raclette cheese and a sprig of fresh thyme.
Close the raclette grill and let the cheese melt for 1 minute.
Serve the melted foie gras immediately and enjoy.
Garnish with additional fresh thyme if desired.
